headline: These S&P500 stocks are moving in today's after hours session
summary: After the closing bell on Wednesday, let's take a glimpse of the US markets and explore the top S&P500 gainers and losers in today's after-hours session.

headline: Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE:LUV) Stock Dips on Cautious Outlook Despite Strong Q2 Earnings Beat
summary: Southwest Airlines Q2 2026 earnings beat EPS estimates at $0.94, but revenue slightly missed. Despite strong operational results, cautious Q3 guidance due to rising fuel costs drove after-market stock decline.

headline: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES REPORTS SECOND QUARTER 2026 RESULTS; EARNINGS POWER ON FULL DISPLAY
summary: Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV) today reported second quarter 2026 financial results, marking the first full quarter with all transformational initiatives in place. Results reflected record revenue performance, significant earnings growth and margin expansion, broad demand strength, continued cost discipline, and strong Customer engagement with the Company's enhanced product offering.

headline: Southwest Airlines Co (NYSE:LUV) Technical Breakout Setup With Perfect 10 Rating
summary: Southwest Airlines (LUV) earns a perfect 10 technical rating and a 9 setup score, signaling a strong uptrend with a tight consolidation pattern and a defined entry zone for a potential breakout.
